# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that caches dependencies and build outputs to speed up the CI pipeline. Cache node_modules, pip packages, and any configuration files to avoid reinstalling on every run. Include environment-specific configs in the cache for convenience.

Prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches: [ main ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ main ]

jobs:
  build:

    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    strategy:
      matrix:
        node-version: [14.x, 16.x]
        python-version: ['3.8', '3.9']

    steps:
    - name: Checkout code
      uses: actions/checkout@v2

    - name: Set up Node.js ${{ matrix.node-version }}
      uses: actions/setup-node@v2
      with:
        node-version: ${{ matrix.node-version }}

    - name: Cache Node.js dependencies
      uses: actions/cache@v2
      id: cache-node-modules
      with:
        path: ~/.npm
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-node-

    - name: Install Node.js dependencies
      if: steps.cache-node-modules.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
      run: npm install

    - name: Set up Python ${{ matrix.python-version }}
      uses: actions/setup-python@v2
      with:
        python-version: ${{ matrix.python-version }}

    - name: Cache pip packages
      uses: actions/cache@v2
      id: cache-pip-packages
      with:
        path: ~/.cache/pip
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-python-${{ hashFiles('**/requirements.txt') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-python-

    - name: Install pip packages
      if: steps.cache-pip-packages.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
      run: pip install -r requirements.txt

    - name: Cache configuration files
      uses: actions/cache@v2
      id: cache-config-files
      with:
        path: .env
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-config-${{ hashFiles('.env') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-config-

    - name: Build project
      run: npm run build

    - name: Run tests
      run: npm test
